startroom.description:
Feeling your way through the darkness, you repeatedly bump into long tables and rows of chairs.
The chamber is large, perhaps resembling some kind of dining hall
There are three exits.
To the west lies a small <g>side room<g> (maybe somewhere you could hide?)
To the south is a <g>second entrance<g> that seems sealed with a strange magic
The <g>main entrance<g> seems to be to your east 
you feel a <y>book<y> on one of the tables
startroom.description2:
Feeling your way through the darkness, you repeatedly bump into long tables and rows of chairs.
The chamber is large, perhaps resembling some kind of dining hall
There are three exits.
To the west lies a small <g>side room<g> (maybe somewhere you could hide?)
To the south is a <g>second entrance<g> that seems sealed with a strange magic
The <g>main entrance<g> seems to be to your east

sideroom.description:
You find yourself in a small side chamber of unknown purpose. The room is cramped and quiet
The silence here feels protective rather than threatening, making this seem like a good place to hide if you need to
The only exit is the <g>door<g>, leading back to the chamber from which you came

hallway1.description:
You are standing at one end of a long corridor that seems to connect much of the dungeon.
The air is cold and still, and your footsteps echo into the darkness ahead.
You cannot tell where the corridor ends, but through touch you discover a few doorways nearby.
On the north wall is the door to the <g>starting room<g>, the dining hall you first woke up in
further along the north wall you feel a door to a <g>small room<g>
next to this is a <g>locked door<g> that is sealed shut with a strange magic
To the south is an <g>open room<g>, from which a faint stale smell drifts into the corridor.
You may also continue <g>down<g> the corridor, where the passage fades into darkness

kniferoom.description:
You are in a small chamber with shelves along the walls 
the room is filled with stale smells that are hard to place
 you feel a <y>dagger<y> among other strange implements on one of the tables 
there is only one <g>doorway<g>, back into the corridor

vinesroom.description:
You find yourself in a cramped chamber, small enough that you can nearly touch both walls with your arms outstretched. The air is dry with a strange warm wind that doesn't seem to originate from a single source.
To your east stands an overgrown door choked with thick vines. The passage beyond is completely blocked. You will need to cut through the vines before you can enter the <g>side entrance<g>.
To the south is the <g>corridor<g> door, leading back the way you came in
vinesroom.description2:
You find yourself in a cramped chamber, small enough that you can nearly touch both walls with your arms outstretched. The air is dry with a strange warm wind that doesn't seem to originate from a single source.
To your east the remains of the vines you cut are scattered across the floor in front of the<g>side entrance<g>.
To the south is the <g>corridor<g> door, leading back the way you came in

tabletroom.description:
You find yourself in a room of unusual design. A series of wide steps rise away from you, forming a terraced chamber that climbs toward the far side of the room.
As you carefully make your way forward, your foot catches on something. Reaching down, your hands find a <y>corpse<y> lying against one of the tables
The body lies completely still.
Its warmth suggests it has not been here for long.
Every instinct tells you to leave it alone, yet the possibility of supplies to <y>loot<y> is difficult to ignore.
 The <g>locked door<g> to the south is sealed with ancient magic
you could also go out through the <g>side entrance<g> you cut your way through before
tabletroom.description2:
You are still in the terraced room
The body is still there, its pockets now empty
the beast is coming
you hope the tablet you found could break the magic seal on the <g>locked door<g>

hallway2.description:
You have ventured deeper into the corridor.
You hesitate, fear tightening your chest for a moment, but you gather yourself and press on 
 You discover four doors branching from the passage.The <g>first door<g> to the east feels cold.
Further along the eastern wall of the passage, you discover a <g>side door<g>.
There is a <g>glass door<g> to the west that seems different from the others 
At the far end of the corridor stands the <g>fourth door<g>, silent and unmoving in the darkness.
except for the glass door, these doors seem to be sealed by the same dark magic as many others
you could go <g>up<g> the corridor
but around the corner the other way there seems to be something lurking and grumbling in the darkness, blocking the way <g>down<g> the corridor
hallway2.description2:
You have ventured deeper into the corridor.
You hesitate, fear tightening your chest for a moment, but you gather yourself and press on 
 You discover four doors branching from the passage.The <g>first door<g> to the east feels cold.
Further along the eastern wall of the passage, you discover a <g>side door<g>.
There is a <g>glass door<g> to the west that seems different from the others 
At the far end of the corridor stands the <g>fourth door<g>, silent and unmoving in the darkness.
except for the glass door, these doors seem to be sealed by the same dark magic as many others
you could also go <g>up<g> or <g>down<g> the corridor

hallway3.description:
The hallway before you stretches into darkness, thick with stale air and the faint smell of sweat and decay.
 There is a single <g>door<g> on the south facing wall.
The corridor continues <down> around a corner at the west end 
you could also go back <g>up<g> the corridor

hallway4.description:
You find yourself at another end of the corridor
It is quiet and the air is cold and still.
At the northern end stands a <g>forward door<g>, this door feels strangely familiar, but you cannot place why.
To the east is a <g>side door<g> that feels important
The silence here feels deafening and imposing, you are close, you just need to keep going

renovatedroom.description:
You find yourself in an strange room. Dust hangs thick in the air, clinging to your skin with every movement.
Through touch, you sense exposed timber and cold metal beams all over the walls of the room
It feels like tools or maybe weapons are scattered across the floor.
As you search through the clutter, your hand closes around a long handle attached to a massive steel head.
 Must be a <y>warhammer<y> you think to yourself.
The air smells of forged steel, but beneath it lingers something older. as if the room has been stripped open and left bare
Behind you is the <g>first door<g> you entered though.
On the south side of the room is a <g>side entrance<g> that leads deeper into the unknown
renovatedroom.description2:
You find yourself in an strange room. Dust hangs thick in the air, clinging to your skin with every movement.
Through touch, you sense exposed timber and cold metal beams all over the walls of the room
The air smells of forged steel, but beneath it lingers something older. as if the room has been stripped open and left bare
Behind you is the <g>first door<g> you entered though.
On the south side of the room is a <g>side entrance<g> that leads deeper into the unknown

spidersroom.description:
You find yourself in a small, claustrophobic cave. You feel what appears to be a large egg sac blocking the exit out. Fear grips you as you realise, you are in a monster's nest. 
you may need to <y>attack<y> 
The room has a <g>side entrance<g> and a blocked <g>main entrance<g>
spidersroom.description2:
The nest is filled with eggs, sure to hatch at any moment. You should escape before they swarm you.
The <g>side entrance<g> remains unblocked, while the <g>main entrance<g> is now open

smashingroom.description:
You find yourself in a large, mostly open chamber, with tables around the sides and one in the middle 
like many other rooms, the tables here seem to have many strange monolith sculptures in rows, 
if you were to <y>smash<y> something in here it would get the lurker's attention 
there are two doors here, the <g>main entrance> to the corridor north of you 
and a <g>side door<g> at the west end of the chamber
smashingroom.description2: You can hear the lurker coming from the corridor, you should leave out the <g>side entrance<g>

eyesroom.description:
You find yourself in another terraced chamber 
strangely, despite your blindness you swear you can see several menacing red eyes bearing down on you from above 
there are two doors in this chamber, one <g>side entrance<g> to the other room 
and a <g>main entrance<g> out to the corridor 
you are in immediate danger and need to <y>attack<y>
eyesroom.description2:
You are in a large terraced chamber filled with the remains of strange monoliths you have smashed 
you swear these bore glowing red eyes, but darkness has returned... 
you are no longer certain what was real and what wasn't, or isn't 

there are two doors, one <g>side entrance<g> to the other room 
and a <g>main entrance<g> out to the corridor

keyroom.description:
You squeeze into a cramped storage chamber lined with shelves filled with strange containers and damp cloth bundles.
Sharp chemical fumes sting your nose, this room must be full of ancient potions and alchemical mixtures.
 As your hands move through the clutter, something small and metallic shifts softly in the dark, some sort of <y>key<y>
To exit this room you must return through the <g>door<g>
keyroom.description2:
You squeeze into a cramped storage chamber lined with shelves filled with strange containers and damp cloth bundles.
Sharp chemical fumes sting your nose, this room must be full of ancient potions and alchemical mixtures.
